creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Evaldas Auryla from comment #23)
Hello!
I didn't encounter this issue running fluentd without a jail.
Thank you for reporting it.

Could you please test if adding 
rubygem-bundler>=0:sysutils/rubygem-bundler
to the RUN_DEPENDS section of the Makefile will resolve this issue?

If it helps I'll update the upcoming patch for fluentd version 1.12.3 port with this additional dependency.
